areas.label: Avdiivka approaches
areas.read: In the Avdiivka approaches area, there has been a notable trend of strikes and minor incidents, with 825 reported strikes and 3 fires over the past four years. Recent activity shows a slight decrease from 11 to 6 events in the last 45 days, indicating a quieting pattern according to the data trends.

areas.label: Bakhmut sector
areas.read: In the Bakhmut sector, there has been a high volume of reported events totaling 993 since February 2022, predominantly consisting of strikes and rumored activity. Recent data indicates a trend of quieting with fewer confirmed incidents in the last observation window compared to prior periods.
